title: SEOReport.dev Free Actor Output
description: SEO audit report with 0-100 scores across SEO, Security, and Performance domains. Free tier shows scores, summary, and top findings. Upgrade to the paid actor or seoreport.dev for full details.

reportDataset.title: Report Results (Dataset)
reportDataset.description: Full JSON report as a dataset item. Ideal for automation, bulk processing, and integrations.

reportOutput.title: Report Output (Key-Value Store)
reportOutput.description: Direct access to the report JSON stored under the 'OUTPUT' key. Ideal for single-run API access.
